hello

जी
समझ गयी. बहुत सारे overseas buyers Alibaba dot com पर Indian suppliers को ढूँढ रहे हैं. क्या आप export business start करने के लिए open हैं?
जी
क्या मैं जान सकती हूँ कि आप किस type के products export करना चाहते हैं?
power tools
बहुत बढ़िया. P
and self part
Great. Our expert can help you find buyers and navigate challenges. क्या हम 15 मिनट की call arrange करें?
हिंदी हिंदी हिंदी हिंदी हिंदी
जी ठीक है. क्या हम 15 मिनट की call arrange करें हमारे Local Trade Consultant के साथ?
ठीक
क्या आप अपनी current City या Location share कर सकते हैं ताकि हम आपको right Consultant assign कर सकें?
गुजरात
क्या आप चाहेंगे कि मैं इसी number पर Export Basics का एक guide WhatsApp कर दूँ?
what
क्या आप चाहेंगे कि मैं इसी number पर Export Basics का एक guide WhatsApp कर दूँ?
जी भेजिए
ठीक है! मैं आपको WhatsApp पर guide भेज दूँगी. Wishing you success. Goodbye!

trans.explain: One wrong segment in this call: the user asked about a spare part, the ASR wrote "self part". One word, but it changes what the customer wants and the agent searched the wrong thing. Every other turn here was clean, so the skill is catching the one that isn't without flagging the rest.

turns.text: Hello, मैं नेहा बोल रही हूँ जीना सीखो से। क्या यह बात करने के लिए सही समय है? सिर्फ 2 मिनट लगेंगे।
हां बोलिए
आप जीना सीखो से नेहा बोल रही हूँ। क्या आप Sea Buckthorn Juice with Ashwagandha खरीदने में interested थे? आपका order अभी cart में रखा है।
हां बोल हां
अगर आप अभी checkout करें तो मैं आपकी मदद कर सकती हूँ। आपका total Six Thousand One Hundred Fifty Rupees है। आप चाहें तो अभी checkout कर सकते हैं?
कितना
आपका total Six Thousand One Hundred Fifty Rupees है, वैसे इसमें अभी कोई discount नहीं है। क्या मैं आपका checkout link WhatsApp पर भेज दूँ?
हां भेज दीजिए
बस एक मिनट दीजिए, मैं अभी वापस आती हूँ।
Great - मैंने checkout link आपके WhatsApp पर भेज दिया है। क्या मैं आपकी और किसी चीज़ में मदद कर सकती हूँ?
नहीं बस यही वाला order करना था
धन्यवाद! जीना सीखो के साथ खरीदारी का आनंद लें - आपका दिन शुभ हो।

anchors.text: नहीं बस यही वाला order करना था

segments.asr: नहीं बस यही वाला order करना था
segments.golden: नहीं बस यही वाला order करना था

trans.explain: The user said "कितना... one hundred" and the amount got dropped. The number the user gives IS the order, so a missed word here costs money. The rest of the call was transcribed correctly.

turns.text: Hi, I am Zara, calling from Renee Cosmetics - Is this a good time to talk?
yes
I am Zara from RENÉE Cosmetics. Were you looking to buy Hot Shot Face and Body Glowstick? We noticed you left it in your cart.
yeah it has some rooms also
Okay got it, so
what colors is it
what colors do you have
The Hot Shot Glowstick is mainly a glossy, natural glow shade for cheeks and body, no co
ok yeah i would like but on cash only when it is delivered i can pay cash

I’m not able to edit your cart. I've sent the checkout link with your current items, you can add or change anything directly on the website. Shall I send the checkout link with your 10percent discount to your WhatsApp?
Hey, are you still there

anchors.text: yeah it has some rooms also
ok yeah i would like but on cash only when it is delivered i can pay cash

segments.asr: yeah it has some rooms also
segments.golden: yeah it has some rooms also

segments.asr: ok yeah i would like but on cash only when it is delivered i can pay cash
segments.golden: ok yeah i would like but on cash only when it is delivered i can pay cash

trans.explain: A clean call: the ASR heard every turn right. Half the skill is NOT flagging good segments, so the correct move is to mark them all correct. False-flagging wastes expert time and poisons the golden dataset.

turns.text: Hi. I’m Isha, an AI agent from iGolf. Due to limited availability, we are currently accepting advance bookings online on our website from Monday to Thursday. You're welcome to visit as a walk-in on weekends, subject to availability. How may I assist you today?
i want to book

I can help you with that! However, please note that we are currently accepting advance bookings online from Monday to Thursday. You can make your booking through our website at igolfpune.com. If you're looking to visit on a weekend, you're welcome to walk in, subject to availability. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
i want to talk with someone
Please give me a moment. I will transfer the call to a human agent.

anchors.text: i want to talk with someone

pron.explain: The agent garbles the city — "Pune" comes out as "pune.com", like a website. City and proper-noun slots are read from text the TTS has never heard aloud, so they break in ways only a listener catches. Tag = City so the fix lands in the right pronunciation dictionary.

turns.text: Hello, am i speaking with Manali?
मैं ज़ारा हूँ RENÉE Cosmetics से। क्या आप Pink Therapy Anti Aging Skincare Combo खरीदना चाहती थीं? आपका item cart में है।

pron.explain: The agent mispronounces the customer's name, Manali, in the very first line. Names are the highest-stakes pronunciation slot — get it wrong and the customer stops trusting the call in the first five seconds. Tag = Proper Noun.

turns.text: हैलो
क्या आप अभी भी लाइन पर हैं?
Hello
नमस्ते, मैं Priya हूँ, Pocketly से. क्या मैं Pavan Kumar Singh जी से बात कर रही हूँ?
क्या आप अभी भी लाइन पर हैं?
धन्यवाद. मैं आपको याद दिलाना चाहती थी कि आपकी Personal Loan की EMI payment आज due है. amount है एक हज़ार पैंतालीस रुपये दो सौ बीस पैसे. क्या आप आज payment कर पाएँगे?
बहुत अच्छा. आज किस time तक payment कर पाएँगे?
क्या आप अभी भी लाइन पर हैं?
धन्यवाद और नमस्कार!

issue.setup: Play from the marked moment. The user answers, but listen to the agent — it never registers what was said and carries on as if the line went quiet. Log the issue the way you would in the tool.
issue.explain: The user spoke, but the ASR never captured it, so the agent moved on without the answer — a User input capture error. It's not a wrong response (there was no input to respond to) and not repetition. Picking the right type matters because input-capture errors route to the speech-to-text team, not the prompt team.
